# Rachit Creation - Premium Luxury Lehenga Brand

Rachit Creation is a leading luxury designer label based in Surat, Gujarat, specializing in manufacturing premium, high-quality, handcrafted bridal, designer, girlish, and heavy lehengas.

## Core Services

- **Bespoke Tailoring & Customization**: Complete customization of colors, sleeve lengths, necklines, blouse sizing, and embroidery density.
- **Handcrafted Embroidery**: Traditional handwork details including Zari, Zardozi, Kundan, and hand stone embellishments.
- **WhatsApp Consultations & Checkout**: Direct personalized order processing, consultations, and sizing verification via WhatsApp secure links.
- **Global Express Shipping**: Express international delivery to the US, UK, Canada, Australia, UAE, and other worldwide destinations.

## Collections & Catalog

- **Bridal Lehengas**: Grand royal lehengas designed with premium silks and heavy traditional embroideries for weddings.
- **Designer Lehengas**: Modern silhouettes, pastel hues, and unique contemporary drapes.
- **Girlish Lehengas**: Lightweight, vibrant, and elegant designs suitable for bridesmaids, sangeet, and reception parties.
- **Heavy Lehengas**: Detailed and voluminous designer ensembles for traditional festive celebrations and family occasions.

## Navigation and Information

- [Homepage](https://raccreation.com/) - Explore new arrivals, customer testimonials, and trust badges.
- [About Us](https://raccreation.com/about) - The heritage story of Mahesh Patodiya (Founder & Master Craftsman) and Rachit Creation.
- [Contact Us & Inquiries](https://raccreation.com/contact) - Location address, phone contacts, business hours, showroom details, maps, and inquiries form.
- [Blog & Curation Journals](https://raccreation.com/blog) - Styling guides, bridal color trends, and heritage embroidery care journals.
- [Terms of Service](https://raccreation.com/terms-of-service) - Services, ordering guidelines, tailoring timelines, shipping conditions, and custom policies.
- [Privacy Policy](https://raccreation.com/privacy-policy) - Information protection and tracking details.
- [Editorial Policy](https://raccreation.com/editorial-policy) - Content standards and verified accuracy reviews.

## Showroom & Contact Info
- **Address**: Millennium Textile Market, Ring Road, Surat, Gujarat, India.
- **Hours**: Monday to Saturday, 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM (IST).
- **Telephone**: +91 73597 47911
- **Email**: rachitcreation@gmail.com
